{"query":"WGA West 2026 election candidates Board of Directors Officers list","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1689,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.wga.org/news-events/news/press/writers-guild-of-america-west-announces-candidates-for-the-2026-officers-and-board-of-directors-election","title":"Writers Guild of America West Announces Candidates for the 2026 Officers and Board of Directors Election","content":"Los Angeles – The WGAW Board Nominating Committee has announced the initial list of candidates for the 2026 Board of Directors election.
In addition to the candidates selected by the Guild’s Nominating Committee, eligible members may also be nominated by petition.
Members seeking nomination for the Board of Directors must obtain 15 member signatures in support of their petitions.
The deadline for submitting signed petitions to the WGAW is Thursday, July 23 at 12:00 p.m.
Members may submit online nomination petitions by visiting the members-only section of the Guild’s website: www.wga.org.
The WGAW will host a Candidates Night forum, where Guild members may pose questions to the candidates, on Tuesday, September 1.
The voting period concludes on Tuesday, September 15, at 12:00 p.m.
Members may vote online or request a paper ballot to vote by mail.
The Writers Guild of America West (WGAW) is a labor union representing writers of motion pictures, television, radio, and Internet programming, including news and documentaries.
It is involved in a wide range of programs that advance the interests of writers, and is active in public policy and legislative matters on the local, national, and international levels.
For more information on the WGAW, please visit: www.wga.org."},{"url":"https://www.wga.org/","title":"Writers Guild of America West","content":"Registration provides a dated record of the writer's claim to authorship of literary material."},{"url":"https://www.wgaeast.org/council-elections/","title":"Council Elections | Writers Guild of America East","content":"The timeline, call for nominations, candidate information, and directions for the election procedure for the 2026 WGAE Council Election are detailed below.
The 2026 election will be conducted according to approved amendments to the WGAE Constitution, which provide that Guild members nominate and vote only for Council & Vice President seats allotted to their work sector.
Sector nomination forms are available below until the end of the nomination period.
Candidate Eligibility: Any current member who has been in good standing in their work sector for one year preceding the election is eligible to run for a Vice President or Council seat in their sector.
Please note: If a member is nominated for a Vice President or Council seat in a work sector to which they do not belong, that nomination will not be valid.
Wednesday, July 1, 2026 – Call for Nominations announced; Nomination period begins.
Monday, August 17, 2026 – Nominees announced to members.
Tuesday, September 1, 2026, 5:00 PM EDT – Deadline for receipt of request for a paper/mail ballot.
To request a mail ballot, email elections@wgaeast.org.
Thursday, September 10, 2026, 9:00 AM EDT – Voting online and by mail begins.
Wednesday, September 23, 2026, 12:01 AM EDT – All elected candidates assume office."},{"url":"https://www.wga.org/news-events/news/press/wga-announces-2026-mba-negotiating-committee","title":"WGA Announces 2026 MBA Negotiating Committee","content":"Nov 7, 2025 — Contact: Bob Hopkinson (310) 801-8563; Jason Gordon (212) 767-7809. Los Angeles and New York – Writers Guild of America West (WGAW) and ...Read more"}]}
